subcodes.first_line: Exalted be the Lord of Might, Who hath come forth from the horizon of power with a manifest command, and hath called both sovereign and subject [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تعالی مولی الجبروت الذی اتی من افق الاقتدار بامر مبین و دعا الملکوک و المملوک
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
